github.description: GitHub issues, PRs, code search, actions
github.notes: Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN env var. Always enabled.

datadog.notes: PHI-sanitizing server available in mcp-servers/datadog/server.py. Launch via a shell script that injects DD_API_KEY and DD_APP_KEY from your keychain and sets PHI_CONFIG_PATH. Register the script in ~/.claude.json mcpServers. Strips PHI attribute keys and redacts emails/phones/SSNs/JWTs before output. See mcp-servers/datadog/README.md.

snowflake.description: Data warehouse queries and schema inspection
snowflake.notes: PHI-sanitizing server available in mcp-servers/snowflake/server.js. Launch via a shell script that injects SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT, SNOWFLAKE_USER, SNOWFLAKE_PASSWORD from your keychain. Register the script in ~/.claude.json mcpServers. Enforces SELECT-only (LIMIT required), strips PHI fields, redacts strings via Presidio (or regex fallback). See mcp-servers/snowflake/README.md.

postgres.notes: Restricted mode prevents DDL and destructive operations

slack.notes: PHI-sanitizing server available in mcp-servers/slack/server.js. Launch via a shell script that injects SLACK_BOT_TOKEN from your keychain. Register the script in ~/.claude.json mcpServers. Strictly read-only (GET-only), redacts strings via Presidio (or regex fallback). Note: search_messages requires a user token (xoxp-) with search:read scope. See mcp-servers/slack/README.md.

cloudwatch.notes: Uses AWS credential chain (env vars, ~/.aws/credentials, IAM role)

aws-api.notes: Uses AWS credential chain (env vars, ~/.aws/credentials, IAM role)

kubernetes.notes: Uses current kubeconfig context. Read-only mode prevents mutations.

grafana.notes: Requires Grafana instance URL and API key

elasticsearch.notes: Supports basic auth via ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME and ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD

serena.notes: LSP symbol navigation. --context claude-code disables tools that duplicate built-ins. Enabled by default — vital for agent code navigation.

fleet-index.description: Multi-repo fleet index — search, manifests, dependency topology
fleet-index.notes: Reads pre-built manifests from ~/.claude/fleet/. Run 'repo-fleet-index --build' first. Always enabled when fleet is indexed. Update the args path to point to your installed fleet-index-server.js.

zendesk.notes: Requires Zendesk agent email, API token, and subdomain

clickup.notes: PHI-sanitizing server available in mcp-servers/clickup/server.js. Launch via a shell script that injects CLICKUP_API_TOKEN from your keychain. Register the script in ~/.claude.json mcpServers. Strictly read-only (GET-only), redacts strings via Presidio (or regex fallback). Exposes get_task, get_tasks, search_tasks. See mcp-servers/clickup/README.md.

mongodb.notes: PHI-sanitizing server available in mcp-servers/mongodb/server.js. Launch via a shell script that injects MONGODB_URI from your keychain. Register the script in ~/.claude.json mcpServers. Enforces read-only mode, strips PHI fields, batch-redacts strings via Presidio (or regex fallback), 30s timeout. See mcp-servers/mongodb/README.md.

presidio.notes: Detects PII/PHI entities on demand. See best-practices.md section 13 for full sanitization architecture.
